signals.headline: US Annual CPI Inflation Jumps to 3
signals.raw:
US Annual CPI Inflation Jumps to 3.3% in March 2026, Highest Since May 2024, Driven by 21.2% Gas Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The US Bureau of Labor Statistics released March 2026 CPI data today, confirming annual headline inflation at 3.3% (up sharply from 2.4% in February), with a 0.9% monthly rise—the largest since June 2022—fueled by a 21.2% gasoline jump and 10.9% energy increase.[1][4][
